name: Login verifies credentials and redirects
description: When a user enters valid email and password on the login page, they are authenticated and redirected to the main application based on their role.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter the email 'admin@email.com' and password 'admin' into the login form
Submit the login form
Verify the user is redirected to the Dashboard page and the dashboard metrics are visible

name: Input Nota successfully saves a new regular transaction
description: When a user fills the input nota form with a regular customer and item quantities, the transaction is saved and a success message appears.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in using email 'admin@email.com' and password 'admin'
Navigate to the Input Nota page in the Transaksi menu
Select a regular customer (not Flat or RS) from the dropdown
Select a valid 'Jenis Nota' from the dropdown
Enter a quantity greater than 0 for at least one linen item
Submit the form to save the nota
Verify a success toast notification appears confirming the nota was saved

name: Edit Nota updates existing transaction
description: When a user edits an existing nota from the history page, changes its values, and saves, the nota is updated.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in using email 'admin@email.com' and password 'admin'
Navigate to the Riwayat Nota page in the Transaksi menu
Click the 'Edit' button on the first nota in the list to open the edit form
Change the quantity of one of the linen items
Submit the form to update the nota
Verify the application navigates back to Riwayat Nota and displays a success update notification

name: Invoice generates print view
description: When a user selects a customer and period in the Tagihan Invoice page, they can trigger the print view.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in using email 'admin@email.com' and password 'admin'
Navigate to the Invoice page in the Tagihan menu
Select a customer and set a date range
Click the 'Cetak Invoice' button
Verify the invoice content generates correctly

name: Dashboard displays period metrics
description: When a user selects a month period on the Dashboard, the financial metric cards update.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in using email 'admin@email.com' and password 'admin'
Navigate to the Dashboard page in the Keuangan menu
Change the period filter to a previous month
Verify the Omset, Laba, and Piutang cards are visible and updated based on the selected period

name: Utang records new debt
description: When a user fills the debt form and saves, it appears in the active debt table.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in using email 'admin@email.com' and password 'admin'
Navigate to the Utang page in the Keuangan menu
Fill out the 'Catat Utang Baru' form with a name, start and end months, and installment amount
Submit the form to save the debt
Verify the newly recorded debt appears in the 'Daftar Utang' table with an 'AKTIF' badge
